name: debox-ddz-trust-public
description: Public trust surface for DeBox Dou Dizhu rules, verifier, transcript replay, and BOX escrow review.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @debox-ddz/protocol && npm run build -w @debox-ddz/game-core && npm run build -w @debox-ddz/verifier
scripts.test: npm run test -w @debox-ddz/game-core && npm run check -w @debox-ddz/escrow
